prompt: Optimize this MySQL join query joining customer (150K rows) and orders (1.5M rows)...
assertions: Output identifies the GROUP BY temp table or filesort as a key bottleneck
Output proposes a structural rewrite (derived table with pre-aggregation, subquery-to-join, or join reordering)
Output includes at least one index recommendation with CREATE INDEX syntax
Plan comparison is included with before/after metrics on rows examined or cost estimates
Output explains why the rewrite reduces intermediate result size or eliminates temp table operations
